about.title: About Valto
about.description: Valto is an offline-first personal budget tracking app designed for simplicity and privacy. All your financial data stays on your device, no accounts, no cloud sync, no tracking. Take control of your spending with wallets, budgets, categories, and intelligent financial insights.
about.footer: Made with ❤️ for people who value financial awareness.

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitle: Find answers to frequently asked questions about Valto.

items.question: How do I add a transaction?
items.answer: Tap the Quick Actions on the dashboard and choose "Add Expense" or "Add Income". Fill in the amount, select a category and wallet, then save.

items.question: How do I create a new wallet?
items.answer: Go to the Wallets tab and tap "Add Wallet". You can create wallets for cash, bank accounts, mobile money, and savings. Each wallet tracks its own balance independently.

items.question: How do I transfer between wallets?
items.answer: On the dashboard, tap "Transfer" in Quick Actions. Select a source wallet, destination wallet, and the amount. The transfer will debit one wallet and credit the other simultaneously.

items.question: How do budgets work?
items.answer: Budgets are set per category per month. Go to the dashboard and tap "Create Budget" in the Budget section. You'll see a progress bar showing how much of each budget you've used.

items.question: How do I back up my data?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Backup Data. This creates a JSON file containing all your wallets, transactions, categories, budgets, and settings. You can share or save this file to your device or cloud storage.

items.question: How do I restore from a backup?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Restore Data. Pick your backup file using the file picker. The app will validate the backup and replace all current data. This action cannot be undone, consider backing up first.

items.question: How do I change the currency?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Currency. Select from the available currencies. The currency symbol will update across the entire app.

items.question: Does the app support dark mode?
items.answer: Yes. Go to Settings → Theme and choose Light, Dark, or System (follows your device setting).

items.question: How do I protect my data with a PIN?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Security and tap to set up a PIN. You can also enable biometric authentication (fingerprint or face) for quick access. The app will lock automatically when moved to background.

items.question: Does the app work offline?
items.answer: Yes. Valto is fully offline-first. All your data is stored locally on your device. No internet connection is required to add transactions, view reports, or manage wallets.

items.question: How do I reset all data?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Reset All Data. This permanently deletes all wallets, transactions, categories, budgets, and settings. The app will return to its initial state with default seed data. This cannot be undone.

items.question: Can I customize categories?
items.answer: Go to Settings → Categories. You can view all expense and income categories. Custom category management will be available in a future update.
